overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character walking through a rainy industrial district at night. The scene features large HVAC units, metal overpasses, wet neon-lit streets with reflective surfaces, and ends with the character approaching and circling two NPCs standing in an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor beneath HVAC units and overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial building wall beneath large ventilation fans

entered.detail: large industrial ventilation fans mounted on building exterior
rusted metal walkway and support beams overhead
tall concrete wall with metal railings on top
metal chain-link fence running along the left side
yellow warning sign with black lightning bolt symbol

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of large industrial HVAC fans on a building wall. The camera moves forward along a narrow concrete walkway between the building and a retaining wall, passing under a metal overpass structure. The area is dimly lit with artificial lighting and appears wet from rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under industrial overpass

events.description: exiting the covered overpass into the open intersection area

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass toward the open street where distant figures are visible

entered.detail: tall street lamp casting yellow light on wet pavement
industrial structures visible in the foggy distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the metal overpass structure along a concrete sidewalk. Street lamps illuminate the wet path ahead. As the character progresses, the overpass recedes overhead and the scene opens up toward an intersection where distant pedestrians are visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street intersection with neon signage

events.description: camera slows and begins circling around the two standing NPCs

agents.ego_description: approaching two standing NPCs and then circling around them to observe from different angles

notable_agents.action: standing still in the street wearing a white crop top and red thigh-high boots
standing still with short green hair and purple shorts

entered.detail: open asphalt intersection with manhole covers and road markings
illuminated signs including a combat cab advertisement
traffic signal pole at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open industrial intersection with neon-lit buildings visible through the fog. Two female NPCs stand prominently in the street ahead. The camera approaches them and then begins circling around the pair, revealing their distinctive outfits and tattoos while the industrial backdrop remains visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually opens into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins by gliding past large HVAC fans on a building wall, moving forward along a narrow, rain-slicked concrete walkway beneath a heavy metal overpass. As the character progresses, the oppressive structure of the overpass recedes overhead, allowing the scene to expand toward a hazy street illuminated by glowing lamps. The camera then enters an open intersection where neon-lit buildings emerge through the fog, drawing closer to two female NPCs standing in the street. Finally, the movement shifts into a slow circle around the pair, revealing their tattoos and outfits against the backdrop of the industrial district.
